particulars.description: All and whole those subjects known as billiemains, duns, berwickshire being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number BER8565 under exception of (I) those subjects being the burial site shown partly coloured in pink and partly coloured in blue on the plan labelled plan 1 annexed and signed as relative hereto ("plan. 1") and (ii) those subjects being the dwellings at billiemains, duns shown coloured pink on the plan labelled PLAN2 annexed and signed as relative hereto ("plan 2"); together with (one) the benefit of the servitude rights and others contained in the deed of conditions by the chargor and mrs ray curtis calder dated on or around the date of this standard security and registered or currently undergoing registration in the land register of scotland under title number BER8565; (two)the fixtures and fittings; (three) the parts, privileges and pertinents; (four) the chargor's whole right title and interest present and future in and to the subjects hereby secured.

All and whole a one half pro indiviso share of all and whole those two areas of ground shown coloured pink on the plan annexed and signed as relative to the standard security which subjects form part and portion of all and whole those subjects being billiemains farm, duns, registered in the land register of scotland under title number BER8565.
The whole assets of the company.

secured_details.description: All sums due or to become due
